message:
fix: Redirect embedding model output to stderr to prevent MCP protocol corruption (#48)

Console.log in embeddings.ts wrote to stdout, breaking MCP JSON-RPC.
Redirect to stderr, suppress transformers.js progress callbacks, and
set defensive env defaults.

Co-authored-by: Tapiocapioca <40611465+Tapiocapioca@users.noreply.github.com>
